title: Closing Remarks | Regulation Day Devconnect Edition
description:
In these closing remarks, Milagros Santamaría (Crecimiento) and Simón Puebla (Crecimiento) reflect on the key conversations, insights, and takeaways from Regulation Day. The session brings the event to a close by highlighting the importance of continued collaboration between the public sector, private stakeholders, and the builder community to shape forward-looking regulatory frameworks.

This session was part of Regulation Day – Devconnect Edition, held during Devconnect 2025 in Buenos Aires. Regulation Day convened policymakers, regulators, founders, builders, and industry leaders to foster open dialogue around regulation, innovation, and the future of decentralized technologies.

Crecimiento is a global movement working to position Argentina as a leading hub for crypto and emerging technologies. Through community-driven programs, education, and dialogue between the public and private sectors, Crecimiento supports builders, founders, and institutions shaping the future of the ecosystem.
